title: [BUG] excel文件里面的sheet页名称为History时不能解析
author: HaiJunCai8
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->
当要解析的excel文件中包含History的sheet页名称时会报错

Lib version: X.Y.Z

## Steps To Reproduce

<!-- The exact steps required to reproduce the issue, ideally with a code example -->

```javascript
const workbook = new Excel.Workbook();
await workbook.xlsx.load(file);
```

## The expected behaviour:

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen. -->
期待当excel中包含History名称的sheet页时，能正常解析，就算是为了避免保留字，也可以给这个sheet页重命名啊，不能指望用户把自己手里的excel里面的包含History名称的sheet页都修改名称啊

## Possible solution (optional, but very helpful):

```javascript

```

comments.author: HaiJunCai8
comments.body: 有没有大佬可以解决啊

comments.author: mingpepe
comments.body:
See #2674.
I would suggest using [this](https://www.npmjs.com/package/patch-package) to create a patch yourself. Just remove some code [here](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/blob/master/lib/doc/worksheet.js#L152).

comments.author: LSL1618
comments.body: 这是微软Office设计的保留字规则，作者建议你改源码来打补丁解决。
